Operation 'updateRows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about what gets updated (rows matching filter), what input is expected (request body with fields), what is returned (count and data), and side effects (only matching rows modified). This helps AI agents understand the conditional update behavior and expected inputs/outputs.

data.current_description: Updates rows matching the specified column and value
data.description_suggestion: Updates all rows in the spreadsheet where the specified column matches the provided value. Accepts a request body containing the fields to update. Returns the count of updated rows and the updated row data. Only rows matching the column/value filter are modified; other rows remain unchanged.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about what gets updated (rows matching filter), what input is expected (request body with fields), what is returned (count and data), and side effects (only matching rows modified). This helps AI agents understand the conditional update behavior and expected inputs/outputs.

message: Operation 'deleteRows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks important context. Added clarity about the destructive nature of the operation, what gets deleted (rows matching filter), what is returned (deletion count), and what is preserved (non-matching rows). This helps AI agents understand the permanence and scope of the deletion.

data.current_description: Deletes rows matching the specified column and value
data.description_suggestion: Deletes all rows in the spreadsheet where the specified column matches the provided value. This is a destructive operation that permanently removes matching rows from the data. Returns the count of deleted rows. Rows not matching the column/value filter are preserved.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks important context. Added clarity about the destructive nature of the operation, what gets deleted (rows matching filter), what is returned (deletion count), and what is preserved (non-matching rows). This helps AI agents understand the permanence and scope of the deletion.

message: Operation 'batchUpdateRows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description mentions the paid account restriction but lacks critical details. Added information about input format (array of row objects), output (count and data), performance benefits, and why an AI agent would choose this over individual updates. This clarifies the bulk operation nature and access requirements.

data.current_description: Updates multiple rows in a single request (paid accounts only)
data.description_suggestion: Updates multiple rows in a single API request for improved performance. Requires a paid account. Accepts an array of row objects with identifiers and fields to update. Returns the count of successfully updated rows and the updated row data. More efficient than individual update requests for bulk operations.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions the paid account restriction but lacks critical details. Added information about input format (array of row objects), output (count and data), performance benefits, and why an AI agent would choose this over individual updates. This clarifies the bulk operation nature and access requirements.

message: Operation 'deleteDuplicates' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief and lacks critical context. Added clarity about how duplicates are identified (column matching), the destructive nature, what is returned (count of removed rows), and scope (entire spreadsheet). This helps AI agents understand the operation's impact and when to use it.

data.current_description: Removes all duplicate rows based on matching column values across the entire spreadsheet. This is a destructive operation that permanently deletes identified duplicates. Returns the count of rows removed. Duplicate detection compares all columns to identify identical rows.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical context. Added clarity about how duplicates are identified (column matching), the destructive nature, what is returned (count of removed rows), and scope (entire spreadsheet). This helps AI agents understand the operation's impact and when to use it.

message: Operation 'clearAll' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description mentions header preservation but lacks important context about destructiveness and parameters. Added clarity about the permanent nature of the operation, what is returned (confirmation), and how to control header preservation via parameters. This helps AI agents understand the scope and irreversibility of this bulk deletion operation.

data.current_description: Removes all data rows from the spreadsheet while preserving the header row by default. This is a destructive operation that permanently deletes all data. Returns confirmation of deletion. Use the preserve_headers parameter to control whether headers are retained.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions header preservation but lacks important context about destructiveness and parameters. Added clarity about the permanent nature of the operation, what is returned (confirmation), and how to control header preservation via parameters. This helps AI agents understand the scope and irreversibility of this bulk deletion operation.

message: Operation 'getContent' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Current description lacks detail about parameter support (filtering, sorting, pagination) and output structure. Summary could be more specific about JSON format. Added context about use cases and output structure to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns an array with all data from the spreadsheet
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all spreadsheet data as JSON
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all rows from the spreadsheet as a JSON array. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination through query parameters. Returns an array of objects where each object represents a row with column headers as keys. Useful for bulk data retrieval and data export operations.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks detail about parameter support (filtering, sorting, pagination) and output structure. Summary could be more specific about JSON format. Added context about use cases and output structure to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createRows' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief and lacks input/output details. Missing information about request body format, return value, and batch operation support. Enhanced description clarifies expected input format, return value, state changes, and batch capabilities for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Appends new rows to the spreadsheet
data.description_suggestion: Appends one or more new rows to the spreadsheet. Accepts a JSON object or array of objects in the request body, where keys correspond to column headers. Returns the created row(s) with their data. Modifies the spreadsheet state by adding rows at the end. Supports batch creation of multiple rows in a single request.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks input/output details. Missing information about request body format, return value, and batch operation support. Enhanced description clarifies expected input format, return value, state changes, and batch capabilities for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'searchRows' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Current description lacks detail about how to specify search conditions and output format. The (AND) notation is unclear for AI agents. Enhanced description clarifies parameter format, matching logic, return value, and use case to improve agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns rows matching ALL specified conditions
data.description_suggestion: Searches the spreadsheet for rows matching ALL specified conditions (AND logic). Accepts search parameters as query strings where multiple conditions must all be satisfied. Returns an array of matching rows as JSON objects. Useful for precise filtering when multiple criteria must be met simultaneously.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks detail about how to specify search conditions and output format. The (AND) notation is unclear for AI agents. Enhanced description clarifies parameter format, matching logic, return value, and use case to improve agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'searchRowsOr' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Current description lacks detail about parameter specification and output format. The (OR) notation is unclear for AI agents. Enhanced description clarifies parameter format, matching logic, return value, and use case to improve agent interpretability and distinguish it from AND search.

data.current_description: Returns rows matching ANY specified condition
data.description_suggestion: Searches the spreadsheet for rows matching ANY specified condition (OR logic). Accepts search parameters as query strings where at least one condition must be satisfied. Returns an array of matching rows as JSON objects. Useful for broader filtering when results matching any of multiple criteria are desired.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks detail about parameter specification and output format. The (OR) notation is unclear for AI agents. Enhanced description clarifies parameter format, matching logic, return value, and use case to improve agent interpretability and distinguish it from AND search.

Operation 'updateRows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about what gets updated (rows matching filter), what input is expected (request body with fields), what is returned (count and data), and side effects (only matching rows modified). This helps AI agents understand the conditional update behavior and expected inputs/outputs.

data.current_description: Updates rows matching the specified column and value
data.description_suggestion: Updates all rows in the spreadsheet where the specified column matches the provided value. Accepts a request body containing the fields to update. Returns the count of updated rows and the updated row data. Only rows matching the column/value filter are modified; other rows remain unchanged.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about what gets updated (rows matching filter), what input is expected (request body with fields), what is returned (count and data), and side effects (only matching rows modified). This helps AI agents understand the conditional update behavior and expected inputs/outputs.

message: Operation 'deleteRows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks important context. Added clarity about the destructive nature of the operation, what gets deleted (rows matching filter), what is returned (deletion count), and what is preserved (non-matching rows). This helps AI agents understand the permanence and scope of the deletion.

data.current_description: Deletes rows matching the specified column and value
data.description_suggestion: Deletes all rows in the spreadsheet where the specified column matches the provided value. This is a destructive operation that permanently removes matching rows from the data. Returns the count of deleted rows. Rows not matching the column/value filter are preserved.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks important context. Added clarity about the destructive nature of the operation, what gets deleted (rows matching filter), what is returned (deletion count), and what is preserved (non-matching rows). This helps AI agents understand the permanence and scope of the deletion.

message: Operation 'batchUpdateRows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description mentions the paid account restriction but lacks critical details. Added information about input format (array of row objects), output (count and data), performance benefits, and why an AI agent would choose this over individual updates. This clarifies the bulk operation nature and access requirements.

data.current_description: Updates multiple rows in a single request (paid accounts only)
data.description_suggestion: Updates multiple rows in a single API request for improved performance. Requires a paid account. Accepts an array of row objects with identifiers and fields to update. Returns the count of successfully updated rows and the updated row data. More efficient than individual update requests for bulk operations.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions the paid account restriction but lacks critical details. Added information about input format (array of row objects), output (count and data), performance benefits, and why an AI agent would choose this over individual updates. This clarifies the bulk operation nature and access requirements.

message: Operation 'deleteDuplicates' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary improved for clarity and actionability. Description needs significant enhancement to explain duplicate detection logic, what constitutes a duplicate, what is returned, and the permanent nature of the operation. Added details about column comparison and return value to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Removes all duplicate rows based on matching column values across the entire spreadsheet. This is a destructive operation that permanently deletes identified duplicates. Returns the count of rows removed. Duplicate detection compares all columns; rows with identical values across all fields are considered duplicates.
data.reasoning: Summary improved for clarity and actionability. Description needs significant enhancement to explain duplicate detection logic, what constitutes a duplicate, what is returned, and the permanent nature of the operation. Added details about column comparison and return value to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'clearAll' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to explain the destructive nature, what is preserved by default (headers), what is returned (deletion count), and the role of the preserve_headers parameter. This helps AI agents understand the scope of data loss and available options.

data.current_description: Removes all data rows from the spreadsheet while preserving the header row by default. This is a destructive operation that permanently deletes all content. Returns the count of deleted rows. Use the preserve_headers parameter to control whether headers are retained.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to explain the destructive nature, what is preserved by default (headers), what is returned (deletion count), and the role of the preserve_headers parameter. This helps AI agents understand the scope of data loss and available options.

data.current_description: Returns an array with all data from the spreadsheet

Returns an array of objects where each object represents a row with column headers as keys. Useful for bulk data retrieval and data export operations.

data.current_description: Appends new rows to the spreadsheet
data.description_suggestion: Appends one or more new rows to the spreadsheet. Accepts a JSON object or array of objects in the request body, where keys correspond to column headers. Returns the created row(s) with their data. Modifies the spreadsheet state by adding rows at the end. Supports batch creation of multiple rows in a single request.

message: Operation 'searchRows' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Current description lacks detail about how to specify search conditions and output format. The (AND) notation is unclear for AI agents. Enhanced description clarifies parameter format, matching logic, return value, and use case to improve agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns rows matching ALL specified conditions
data.description_suggestion: Searches the spreadsheet for rows matching ALL specified conditions (AND logic). Accepts search parameters as query strings where multiple conditions must all be satisfied. Returns an array of matching rows as JSON objects. Useful for precise filtering when multiple criteria must be met simultaneously.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks detail about how to specify search conditions and output format. The (AND) notation is unclear for AI agents. Enhanced description clarifies parameter format, matching logic, return value, and use case to improve agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Searches the spreadsheet for rows matching ANY specified condition (OR logic). Accepts search parameters as query strings where at least one condition must be satisfied.
